title: Top Customers Report
description: Welcome to Rank Challenge — the finale. Build a report of the best customers. Join `users` and `orders`, group by the user `name`, and show the order count and total spend. Keep only customers with more than 5 orders using HAVING, and sort by spend from highest to lowest.
objectives: JOIN users and orders and GROUP BY name
Filter groups with HAVING and sort with ORDER BY
hints: HAVING filters groups after aggregation (WHERE filters rows before).
Aggregate with COUNT and SUM, then ORDER BY the total spend DESC.

files.content:
-- TODO: report each customer's order count and spend, but only the loyal ones, best first
SELECT u.name FROM users u, orders o;

parseRules.failMessage: Group the rows per customer with GROUP BY.
Keep only loyal customers with HAVING.
Sort the report with ORDER BY.
